purpose: Native bilingual content schema for Drishvara English-Hindi content pipeline

fallback_rules.title: Use title_hi when selected language is hi and title_hi exists; otherwise title.
fallback_rules.summary: Use summary_hi when selected language is hi and summary_hi exists; otherwise summary.
fallback_rules.article_body: Use article_html_hi when selected language is hi and article_html_hi exists; otherwise article_html.
fallback_rules.ui: Use site-language.js dictionary for static UI labels.
